meaning: adj.防止损伤的,减少不良影响的
examples: The disposable and atraumatic suture needle with catgut suture applies to obstetrics and gynaecology department.
The disposable and atraumatic suture needle with catgut suture applies to Obstetrics and Gynaecolo-gy department.
Randomly, the caries of one molar was filled by FX with method of atraumatic restorative treatment (ART), the other one with amalgam.
